turns.content: What brings you in today?
I'm so tired all the time. And I lost weight, I don't know why. Maybe 3 months now.
When did this start?
Maybe summer time? I don't remember so good.
Can you describe the pain or discomfort? Where exactly do you feel it?
My arms and legs... they hurt a little. Not bad, just ache. Like after work.
Have you had any fever or chills?
No. No fever. I don't think so.
What medications are you currently taking?
I take the pill for my sugar. The met… something. Metformin? Yes, that one.
Do you have any chronic medical conditions?
I have sugar problem. Diabetes, yes. The doctor tell me before.
Are you allergic to any medications?
No, I don't think so. No problem with medicine.
Have you tried anything to relieve the symptoms?
I just rest more. Sleep longer. No medicine for it.
Does anything make it better or worse?
Work makes it worse. My job, cleaning rooms. After work I am more tired.
How has this been affecting your daily life?
I still work. I have to. But at night, I am very tired. Not good. But okay.
Do you smoke or drink alcohol?
No. No smoke. No drink. Never.
Has anyone in your family had similar problems?
I don't know. My family, they live far. I don't remember. Maybe my mother was sick? I am not sure.
Have you experienced anything like this before?
No. First time. I was fine before. Just tired now.
I've explained quite a bit — does that make sense so far?
What? Sorry, I don't understand. Can you say again, please? Simple words.
On a scale of 1 to 10, how would you rate what you're going through right now — physically, and also emotionally?
Body... maybe 2. Not so bad. Feelings... more, like 4. I am a little worried inside. But it's fine.
Do you have any questions for me?
Is the metformin pill make me tired? Or it is something else?
What do you think might be going on?
I don't know. Maybe my sugar is bad? Or maybe just getting old? I don't know, you tell me.
Is there anything else you think I should know?
No... I think that's all. Just the tired and the weight. And the muscle pain sometimes.
